column1: #   - bottom_nav is a template page. Every real page ends with an
#     `include page=bottom_nav` so the 6-button bar sits at y=1740..1880
#   - DRO rows on the dashboard use scale=3 (24x48 px glyph) for the
#     commanded position and scale=1 for the actual/dtg detail row.
#   - E-stop is the red button at the right of the cycle cluster.
#   - Macros is reachable from the dashboard status bar (small button),
#     deliberately NOT from the bottom nav (operator-critical routes only).
# bottom_nav — shared 7-button bar (included by every page).
# 7 tiles at 140 px with 10 px gaps fill 1040 px of the 1080-wide canvas.
# Order mirrors the workflow: Jog -> MDI -> Program -> View -> Offsets ->
# dashboard — main operator page, DRO hero + cycle cluster
# Feed + spindle at bottom of DRO panel
# jog — manual axis jog with selectable axis and increment

column8: text=Type a G-code line then press Enter or SUBMIT. History is in-RAM only.

column1: # Renders the authored kinematic chain (with OBJ-imported meshes when the
# registry carries them) through the same render_live_machine path the
# Program / Probe pages use. Toggle buttons flip operator_api view flags
# Toolbar (y=40..130): toolpath / toolpods toggles + jog axis selector.
# Viewport (y=150..1440): 1040x1290 — as large as fits above the controls.
# Live DRO strip (y=1450..1550): compact read of all four axes + current step.
# Jog row (y=1570..1730): drive motion while watching the viewport.
# Camera controls — overlayed on the viewport bottom-right. Buttons are
# small because orbit is primary (drag the viewport); these are handy
# backups for non-touch inputs. Keyboard +/- and 0 also work globally.
# offsets — full tabular view of all 6 WCS + 8 tools.
# Active row is the one currently selected; the commit inputs always
# edit the active row, so tap a WCS/Tool row to make it active then
# type new values into the inputs below. Readouts for non-active rows
# need per-slot binds which the binder doesn't yet expose — they show
# as "---" placeholders until that wiring lands.

column8: text=Edit active work offset (type + Enter to commit)

column1: # active row shows live values; other rows will be "---" until per-slot binds exist
# active-tool readouts (same caveat as WCS rows)
